/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libxrf2_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libxrf2_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/xrf2_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/xrf2_msgs/msg/detail/ros2_xeno__type_support_c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xrf2_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/xrf2_msgs/msg/detail/xeno2_ros__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/home/srik/ros_ubuntu/ros2_ws/build/xrf2_msgs: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libxrf2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
